name: AEMETIS, INC
summary: Aemetis, Inc. is an international renewable natural gas and renewable fuels company founded in 2006 and headquartered in Cupertino, California. The company operates a 65 million gallon per year ethanol plant in Keyes, CA; produces renewable natural gas (RNG) from dairy digesters in central California; and operates an 80 million gallon per year biodiesel plant in Kakinada, India. It also develops sustainable aviation fuel, renewable diesel, and carbon capture projects.

products.name: Denatured Fuel Ethanol
products.description: Low carbon renewable fuel ethanol produced at the 65 MGY Keyes Plant in California.

products.name: Wet Distillers Grains (WDG)
products.description: Animal feed byproduct from ethanol production sold to local dairies and feedlots.

products.name: Distillers Corn Oil (DCO)
products.description: Animal feed byproduct from ethanol production sold to local dairies and feedlots.

products.name: Condensed Distillers Solubles (CDS)
products.description: Animal feed byproduct from ethanol production sold to local dairies and feedlots.

products.name: Carbon Dioxide (CO2)
products.description: Commercial grade CO2 captured from ethanol fermentation, sold to food, beverage, and other industries.

products.name: Renewable Natural Gas (RNG)
products.description: Biogas from dairy waste digesters upgraded to RNG and injected into utility pipeline for transportation fuel use.

products.name: Biodiesel
products.description: High-quality distilled biodiesel produced from vegetable oil and animal waste feedstocks at the Kakinada, India plant.

products.name: Refined Glycerin
products.description: Byproduct of biodiesel refining sold to pharmaceutical, personal care, paint, and adhesive industries.

products.name: Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF)
products.description: Planned 78 MGY SAF production at Riverbank Industrial Complex, CA, currently in development.

products.name: Renewable Diesel (RD)
products.description: Planned 90 MGY renewable diesel production at Riverbank Industrial Complex, CA, currently in development.

partnerships.description: Sales of biodiesel to India government-owned OMCs under India's National Biofuels Policy.
Received provisional LCFS pathway approvals enabling generation of additional LCFS credits for RNG.
